title: Eurostat Comext International Trade in Goods (ITG)

downloads.description: Raw Eurostat API export of dataset ext_st_eu27_2020sitc, covering EU27 trade by SITC product group.

access_methods.notes: Official thematic page linking database, bulk download, and web services.
Official metadata page describing dimensions, nomenclatures, and dissemination frequency.
Official Eurostat guide for Comext API access and the dedicated comext dissemination endpoint.
Verified on 2026-04-22 as a live raw JSON endpoint returning dataset content.
Official Comext SDMX dataflow registry used to verify the dedicated Comext dissemination service.

access_conditions: Public aggregate access is available through Eurostat web interfaces and API endpoints.
Comext full datasets may require filtering or bulk-download workflows depending on dataset size.
limitations: The downloaded file is one verified Comext API dataset and not the full Comext bulk domain.
The current manifest pins a working raw endpoint for one documented ITG table rather than the entire family of trade datasets.
